## Summary

What you want to happen.

## Why It Matters

Who benefits and how.

## Proposed Solution (optional)

Any ideas on how to implement it.

## Alternatives (optional)

Other approaches you considered.

## Extra Info (optional)

Mockups, links, or examples.
